option_a_v1.key_finding: lambda_dom=2.0 dominated by seed scale (L/n_modes), not lambda_MJ,fiber

option_a_v2.key_finding: Radial collapse dominates; single core not fragmentation; FWHM->grid-scale in 1.8 t_ff
option_a_v2.physical_conclusion: For rho_c=4, sigma=0.6 lJ: fragmentation timescale >= collapse timescale
